SAEM 2026 AI Consensus Conference · Workgroup 4

Workgroup 4 · Meeting 2 of 3

Mid-Point Review — Round 1 Results

Human-AI Interaction & the Perception of Self

Wednesday, April 29, 2026 · 3:00–3:45 PM ET · Virtual · 45 min · Virtual

Agenda

TimeTopic
3:00–3:03Welcome back & quick roll call
3:03–3:10Round 1 response summary: participation, confirmed vs. pending (live data)
3:10–3:22Domain A & B review: per-question discussion and disagreements
3:22–3:32Domain C & D review: per-question discussion and disagreements
3:32–3:40Wording changes & proposals: split, merge, reword, or drop
3:40–3:45Round 2 launch: timeline and what's changing

Where We Are

Round 1 is closed. The live results below are pulled directly from the Round 1 Google Sheet — every time you open this page or hit Refresh, you'll see the most current tallies.

The goal of this meeting is to walk through the data together, surface the questions where the group disagreed most, and decide what (if anything) needs to be reworded or split before Round 2 opens.

How to Read the Results

  • CONFIRMED — ≥80% Include. These items meet the consensus threshold and likely move forward unchanged.
  • PENDING — between 20% and 80% Include. Worth discussing: is this a wording issue, a scope issue, or a real disagreement?
  • EXCLUDED — ≤20% Include. The group does not see this as a top research priority.

Round 2 Game Plan

  1. For PENDING questions, decide as a group whether to (a) reword, (b) split into two, (c) merge, or (d) leave as-is.
  2. Update the Round 2 form to reflect agreed changes.
  3. Re-open voting for ~10 days. Each member re-rates all 18 (or revised) questions.
  4. Reconvene at Meeting 3 to finalize the slate before Atlanta.
